title: Why °Abdallah b. 'Amir was put in charge of al-Ba§rah and some events during his Activity there
description: Why °Abdallah b. 'Amir was put in charge of al-Ba§rah and some events during his Activity there. Recorded under the year 41 AH (661–662 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 18.
